overall.description: Vehicle-mounted camera drives along a winding Mediterranean coastal road in game engine footage (GTA V/FiveM). The clip transitions from a village street lined with stone houses to an open coastal view revealing the sea, with the road cutting through rocky hillsides dotted with pine trees.

agents.ego_description: driving along the winding road past Mediterranean-style houses on the left

entered.detail: stone buildings with terracotta roofs lining the left side of the road
steep rocky hillside with sparse vegetation rising immediately beside the road
low stone wall running along the right edge of the asphalt
green pine trees growing on the rocky slope above the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a winding asphalt road through a Mediterranean village. Stone houses with terracotta roofs line the left side while a rocky cliff face rises on the right. The sky is clear and blue, with sunlight casting shadows across the road.

events.description: road curves left revealing the Mediterranean sea and distant coastline

agents.ego_description: navigating the left curve along the coastal road with the sea now visible on the left

entered.detail: blue sea visible beyond the cliff edge on the left side of the road
cluster of buildings perched on the distant hillside along the coastline
Mediterranean-style houses with terracotta roofs on the right side of the road
tall palm trees growing alongside the road on the right

segments.scene_description: As the road curves left, the scene opens up to reveal the Mediterranean sea on the left. The vehicle continues along the coastal road with the rocky cliff still on the right and villas and palm trees now visible on the inland side. The distant coastline features a village perched on the hills across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow village street that gradually opens into a wide coastal vista. It begins with the vehicle traveling along a winding asphalt road, flanked by stone houses with terracotta roofs on the left and a towering rocky cliff face on the right. As the road curves left, the enclosed village atmosphere shifts and expands to reveal the shimmering Mediterranean sea stretching out to the left. The scene then opens further, passing palm trees and villas while the rocky cliff remains a constant presence on the right. Finally, the perspective widens to show a distant village perched on the hills across the water under a clear, sunlit blue sky.
